messages.author: Mark N7YD
messages.text: Here's a challenge for you. I wrote an entire build system using objected-oriented techniques and /bin/sh. The compiled packages were placed in directories and the build system used a series of nested includes to implement inheritance. A total of about 1000 lines of /bin/sh. This was back when software was distributed on QIC tape cartridges.
messages.content_html: Here's a challenge for you. I wrote an entire build system using objected-oriented techniques and /bin/sh. The compiled packages were placed in directories and the build system used a series of nested includes to implement inheritance. A total of about 1000 lines of /bin/sh. This was back when software was distributed on QIC tape cartridges.
